Wdr48 (UAF1) is an essential cofactor forthe deubiquitinating enzymes USP1, USP12, and USP46. In macrophages, the USP1-Wdr48 complex plays a critical role in DNA damage repair by deubiquitinating PCNA and FANCD2. Answer: A) Up-regulated.
